title: Uppsala Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Uppsala, with a Z-Score of -3.63. This event is rated as CRITICAL with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current temperature in Uppsala is significantly lower than average, with a high Z-Score indicating a rare event. 
 The city is experiencing a high level of humidity at 71%, with winds blowing at 2.9 km/h. 
 The Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 13.7 GG, while the Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 0.0 GG, indicating a high demand for heating.
conclusion: Implement emergency measures to mitigate the effects of the cold snap.
